message:
test(P2.6): history persistence across Codex process::exit(2) — 4 scenarios

Validates that flush_sync() at src/main.rs:653-655 prevents history entry
loss when Codex deny calls process::exit(2):
- Happy path: history enabled + DCG_HISTORY_DB → DB exists with data
- History disabled: exit 2 still works, no DB created, no panic
- Rapid-fire: 5 sequential Codex denies, all entries persist
- Write-protected dir: flush fails gracefully, no panic, still exit 2

All 60 integration tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
